text.title: rag-architecture Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree deciding RAG vs long-context vs fine-tune.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the corpus exceed a single LLM context window AND is it private/freshly updated?

branch.conclusion: Use long-context prompting; skip RAG architecture.

branch.when: corpus is stable AND closed AND fine_tune_budget_available == true

branch.conclusion: Design a 2-phase RAG architecture using r1-r5.
Plan agentic-RAG variant on top of the base architecture.

example.description: For 100M tokens of internal docs with weekly updates, RAG architecture is the only viable choice.
